untranslatable_reason: Market breadth indicator (negative breadth confirmation) is not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal requires confirmation by 'negative breadth at [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]' which cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators.
translation_notes: Translated price penetration below lower Bollinger Band (close < bb_lower) and volume confirmation (volume > vol_ratio_20). Used price_pos_20 < 0.3 as a proxy for downside positioning. Market breadth confirmation cannot be implemented as no breadth indicators are available. Exit condition set to reversal above middle band (close > bb_middle) as author provided no explicit exit signal. Volume and breadth thresholds were not specified in original signal ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders), so used standard vol_ratio_20 > 1.0 assumption for elevated volume.
